repos.name: simplex-chat/simplex-chat
repos.desc: SimpleX - the first messaging network operating without user identifiers of any kind - 100% private by design! iOS, Android and desktop apps 📱!

repos.name: xbtlin/ai-berkshire
repos.desc: AI 时代的伯克希尔：基于 Claude Code / Codex 的价值投资研究框架。巴菲特·芒格·段永平·李录四大师方法论 + 多Agent并行研究。| AI-era Berkshire: a value investing research framework built for Claude Code / Codex. 4 masters' methodologies + multi-agent adversarial analysis.

repos.name: commaai/openpilot
repos.desc: openpilot is an operating system for robotics. Currently, it upgrades the driver assistance system on 300+ supported cars.

repos.name: IceWhaleTech/CasaOS
repos.desc: CasaOS - A simple, easy-to-use, elegant open-source Personal Cloud system.

repos.name: ripienaar/free-for-dev
repos.desc: A list of SaaS, PaaS and IaaS offerings that have free tiers of interest to devops and infradev

repos.name: google-labs-code/design.md
repos.desc: A format specification for describing a visual identity to coding agents. DESIGN.md gives agents a persistent, structured understanding of a design system.

repos.name: microsoft/PowerToys
repos.desc: Microsoft PowerToys is a collection of utilities that supercharge productivity and customization on Windows

repos.name: hugohe3/ppt-master
repos.desc: AI generates a real, editable PowerPoint from any document — native shapes & animations, speaker notes voiced as audio narration, and the option to follow your own .pptx template, not slide images · by Hugo He

repos.name: JCodesMore/ai-website-cloner-template
repos.desc: Clone any website with one command using AI coding agents

repos.name: garrytan/gstack
repos.desc: Use Garry Tan's exact Claude Code setup: 23 opinionated tools that serve as CEO, Designer, Eng Manager, Release Manager, Doc Engineer, and QA

repos.name: NanmiCoder/MediaCrawler
repos.desc: 小红书笔记 | 评论爬虫、抖音视频 | 评论爬虫、快手视频 | 评论爬虫、B 站视频 ｜ 评论爬虫、微博帖子 ｜ 评论爬虫、百度贴吧帖子 ｜ 百度贴吧评论回复爬虫 | 知乎问答文章｜评论爬虫

repos.name: Anil-matcha/Open-Generative-AI
repos.desc: Unrestricted Open-source alternative to AI video platforms — Free AI image & video generation studio with 200+ models (Flux, Midjourney, Kling, Sora, Veo). No content filters. Self-hosted, MIT licensed.

repos.name: topoteretes/cognee
repos.desc: Cognee is the open-source AI memory platform for agents. Give your AI agents persistent long-term memory across sessions with a self-hosted knowledge graph engine.

repos.name: dbt-labs/dbt-core
repos.desc: dbt enables data analysts and engineers to transform their data using the same practices that software engineers use to build applications.

repos.name: luongnv89/claude-howto
repos.desc: A visual, example-driven guide to Claude Code — from basic concepts to advanced agents, with copy-paste templates that bring immediate value.

repos.name: anomalyco/opencode
repos.desc: The open source coding agent.

repos.name: Fission-AI/OpenSpec
repos.desc: Spec-driven development (SDD) for AI coding assistants.

repos.name: HKUDS/Vibe-Trading
repos.desc: "Vibe-Trading: Your Personal Trading Agent"

repos.name: keycloak/keycloak
repos.desc: Open Source Identity and Access Management For Modern Applications and Services

repos.desc: Open source alternative to Semrush and Ahrefs
